Practice SIEM & Malware Investigation

Responded to Critical, High, and Medium level alerts in Let's Defend practice SIEM tool. Investigated malware on virtual machines to understand the attacker's process, attack vector, and kill chain.

  • View Details

Virtualized DMZ / Network Implementation

Created a multi-zone network (WAN/DMZ/LAN) using VirtualBox to isolate internal servers; deployed a pfSense virtual firewall gateway to manage traffic flow and enforce perimeter security.

  • View Details

AES Encryption Algorithm

Developed a functional AES-128 encryption pipeline in Python. Implemented the four-stage transformation rounds and the Rijndael key expansion schedule.

  • View Details
